findings.evidence: `code/TauCeti/Analysis/InnerProductSpace/HilbertBasisMap.lean:39` has `(b.mapₗᵢ e).repr = e.symm.trans b.repr`; `mathlib/Mathlib/Analysis/InnerProductSpace/l2Space.lean:408` has `HilbertBasis.repr_apply_apply`, giving `b.repr v i = ⟪b i, v⟫`.
findings.fix: Drop these lemmas, or justify why the applied simp forms are needed instead of using `HilbertBasis.repr_mapₗᵢ` followed by `LinearIsometryEquiv.trans_apply` and `HilbertBasis.repr_apply_apply`.
findings.issue: `repr_mapₗᵢ_apply` and `repr_mapₗᵢ_apply_apply` are just specializations of the existing representation equality and Mathlib coordinate lemma.

summary: The new coordinate lemmas are applied/specialized forms of existing HilbertBasis representation APIs, so this PR adds parallel API rather than reusing the general declarations.
